overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character exiting an elevator into a neon-drenched Night City alley, navigating through dense urban environments with holographic advertisements, crossing busy intersections with futuristic traffic, and approaching a crime scene. The clip features characteristic cyberpunk aesthetics with vibrant cyan and magenta neon lighting, wet reflective streets, and a transition to third-person perspective in the final moments.

events.description: elevator doors open revealing neon-lit alleyway with police presence

agents.ego_description: exiting elevator into dark alley with weapon visible in hand, moving toward the street

notable_agents.action: NCPD police car parked on the right side with teal neon underglow

entered.detail: red metal elevator doors with yellow illuminated control panel
bright teal neon sign illuminating the end of the alley
black futuristic police vehicle with cyan neon accents
concrete wall covered in pink and green neon graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: The clip begins inside an elevator looking out into a dark, narrow alleyway bathed in teal neon light. As the camera moves forward, it exits the elevator revealing an NCPD police car parked on the right and graffiti-covered walls on the left, establishing the cyberpunk urban setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the overpass, passing various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian leaning against graffiti wall smoking
pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead under the overpass

entered.detail: massive digital billboard displaying EL GUAPO advertisement with chrome skull graphic
concrete and metal highway overpass creating a canopy overhead
small kiosk with magazines and digital displays

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a covered walkway beneath a massive overpass, passing the iconic EL GUAPO billboard on the left. The environment is dense with urban detail including graffiti, vending stands, and scattered pedestrians moving in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and moving traffic

events.description: vehicles pass through the intersection perpendicular to the camera's path
begins crossing the wide intersection following the pedestrian walk signal

agents.ego_description: navigating across the wide street with yellow zebra stripes while monitoring traffic

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection from right to left
futuristic truck passing through the cross traffic

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow and black striped pattern
elevated multi-lane roadway structure spanning the intersection
illuminated pedestrian walk signal showing green figure

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a massive intersection with a wide yellow crosswalk. The camera crosses the street while futuristic vehicles pass perpendicular through the intersection, with an elevated highway structure visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza with steam vents and holographic advertisements

events.description: enters open plaza area with decorative cherry blossom trees and ground steam vents
camera perspective switches from first-person to third-person showing character from behind

agents.ego_description: running across the expansive plaza crosswalk, passing other pedestrians, with camera switching to third-person view

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt walking ahead on the crosswalk

entered.detail: trees with pink blossoms and illuminated golden trunks lining the plaza
ground-level vents emitting thick white steam across the pavement
floating three-dimensional digital advertisements between buildings

segments.scene_description: The character transitions to running across a wide commercial plaza featuring distinctive cherry blossom trees with pink foliage and ground steam vents creating atmospheric effects. Holographic advertisements float between the towering buildings as the camera switches to a third-person perspective showing the character from behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with crime scene and barricades

events.description: discovers multiple bodies lying on the sidewalk near metal barricades

agents.ego_description: walking along the crowded commercial sidewalk approaching a scene with deceased individuals on the ground

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking away from the camera toward the plaza
bodies of deceased individuals lying on the pavement near the railing

entered.detail: multiple deceased individuals lying on the sidewalk suggesting recent violence
black metal crowd control barriers lining the edge of the walkway
bright green and pink neon signs marking commercial shops

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking through a dense commercial area with bright neon storefronts and holographic advertisements overhead. The camera approaches a crime scene where multiple bodies lie on the sidewalk near metal barricades, while other pedestrians continue walking through the area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that begins in a claustrophobic, neon-lit alleyway and expands into a sprawling, high-tech commercial district. It begins by exiting an elevator into a dark alley bathed in teal light, passing a parked NCPD police car and graffiti-covered walls. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts beneath a massive overpass and a large EL GUAPO billboard, navigating a dense walkway crowded with vending stands and pedestrians. The environment then opens up into a wide intersection with a yellow crosswalk and futuristic traffic before transitioning into a run across a commercial plaza filled with pink cherry blossom trees, steam vents, and floating holograms. Finally, the perspective shifts to third-person as the character walks through a bright neon shopping area, approaching a barricaded crime scene where bodies lie on the sidewalk.
